vocabulary.name: GeoTime
editorialNotes: The GeoTime vocabulary is based on a collaboration between the GBIF Secretariat and the Paleo Data Working Group. The Paleo Data Working Group mapped the verbatim values to concepts across the 10 dwc fields and ensured community engagement and expertise to define the structure of the vocabulary.

definition.en: This vocabulary covers concepts for terms in the DwC Geological Context class that refer to chronostratigraphy (geologic time). The dwc terms that will use the vocabulary are: earliestEonOrLowestEonothem, latestEonOrHighestEonothem, earliestEraOrLowestErathem, latestEraOrHighestErathem, earliestPeriodOrLowestSystem, latestPeriodOrHighestSystem, earliestEpochOrLowestSeries, latestEpochOrHighestSeries, earliestAgeOrLowestStage, latestAgeOrHighestStage. The source is the International Commission on Stratigraphy (ICS) and the CGI Geoscience Terminology Working Group.
